highlights.text: Marina Bay, Gardens by the Bay & Sentosa leisure
Great Ocean Road Twelve Apostles & Phillip Island penguins

itinerary.title: Singapore & Melbourne Family Tour
itinerary.tagline: Singapore • Marina Bay • Melbourne • Great Ocean Road • Phillip Island
itinerary.overview: A magnificent multi-country family expedition connecting Singapore's futuristic metropolitan marvels with Melbourne's artistic culture and wild coastlines. Gardens by the Bay, Sentosa, Melbourne laneways, Great Ocean Road, and Phillip Island Penguin Parade — a harmonious blend of adventure and discovery.
itinerary.seo_title: SG-004 | Singapore & Melbourne Family Tour | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 07 Nights / 08 Days Singapore & Australia family package (SG-004): Marina Bay, Gardens by the Bay, Melbourne laneways, Great Ocean Road, and Phillip Island.

highlights.text: Marina Bay & Gardens by the Bay

days.title: Arrival in Singapore & Marina Bay
days.description: Arrive in Singapore. Private transfer to premium hotel. Evening exploring breathtaking Marina Bay with spectacular light shows.
activities: Sightseeing Included: VIP airport reception, Marina Bay evening exploration
Meals Included: Welcome arrangements on arrival

days.title: Gardens by the Bay Exploration
days.description: Full day at Gardens by the Bay discovering Cloud Forest and Flower Dome — a top-tier Singapore family experience.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Gardens by the Bay, Cloud Forest, Flower Dome

days.title: Singapore Family Leisure
days.description: Relaxing day with family-friendly Sentosa Island beaches and attractions.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Sentosa Island beaches and attractions

days.title: Flight to Melbourne
days.description: Private transfer to airport for flight to Melbourne. Check into city-centre luxury family hotel.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private airport transfer, domestic/international flight coordination to Melbourne

days.title: Melbourne Lanes & Arts
days.description: Private guided walking tour through Melbourne's world-famous street-art laneways and vibrant culture centres.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Melbourne laneways street-art guided walking tour

days.title: Great Ocean Road Expedition
days.description: Exhilarating full-day adventure along the Great Ocean Road witnessing dramatic Twelve Apostles landscapes.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Great Ocean Road day trip, Twelve Apostles viewpoint

days.title: Phillip Island Wildlife Gala
days.description: Journey to Phillip Island to watch native wildlife and the famous Penguin Parade — a highlight for the entire family.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Phillip Island Penguin Parade tickets, wildlife viewing

days.title: Departure
days.description: Final luxury breakfast before TRAGUIN private transfer to Melbourne airport, completing your premium multi-country family expedition.

inclusions.text: 07 Nights in premium family hotels across Singapore and Melbourne
Private luxury ground transfers throughout both destinations
Flight coordination from Singapore to Melbourne
Marina Bay, Gardens by the Bay, Great Ocean Road, and Phillip Island sightseeing
TRAGUIN 24/7 dedicated on-ground family concierge support
International airfare and visa processing fees for Singapore and Australia
Personal expenses, laundry, room service, and mini-bar charges
Optional sightseeing excursions not specified in the itinerary
Tipping, porterage fees, and travel insurance
